text.title: LLM-Powered Conversational UI Spec Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the llm-powered-conversational-ai methodology.

example.title: Customer-support chat with refund tool
example.narrative: User chats with assistant; assistant can call refund_order() tool. Spec defines: turn schema with tool-call rendering, refund requires explicit user confirmation (irreversible), refusal pattern for out-of-policy refunds, voice parity for the same flow.
example.artifact: conversational-spec.md with turn schema + tool table + refusal patterns + a11y rules.
